verifier_rubric: per-paper joint coverage of all K=4 candidate sub-mechanisms
rationale: Two disjoint clusters: SVGD machinery (M_2, M_3-with-true-score) in papers 1-3; transformer-as-particles (M_1-analog) in papers 4-7. M_3 (learned score s_θ) and M_4 (SVGD residual term) absent everywhere. Pattern E preserved.
